title: Larijani Signals Progress on US Talks Framework
detail: Iran's top security official Ali Larijani writes on X that 'the formation of a structure for negotiations is underway,' contradicting what he calls 'artificial media warfare.' Foreign Minister Araghchi tells Turkey's FM Fidan that Iran is prepared for 'fair and equitable' talks. Trump tells reporters Iran is 'seriously talking,' creating a paradoxical moment of diplomatic signaling amid intense military buildup.

title: F-35A Stealth Fighter Buildup at Jordan Base
detail: The contingent of F-35A Lightning II stealth fighters at Muwaffaq al-Salti Air Base in Jordan continues to grow, with the deployment projected to reach 30 airframes. Combined with 24 F-15E Strike Eagles and A-10 Thunderbolt IIs already in place, the base now hosts more than 60 advanced combat aircraft. Satellite imagery confirms expanded ramp space and hardened shelter usage consistent with preparations for contested-state operations.

title: Trump Escalates Warnings on Truth Social
detail: In the final days of January, President Trump uses Truth Social to issue a series of public warnings directed at Iran, marking one of the most visible escalations in US messaging during the crisis. The posts combine threats of military action with statements about Iran 'seriously talking,' creating uncertainty about Washington's true intentions. Analysts note the dual-track messaging may be designed to maintain maximum pressure while keeping diplomatic channels open.
